subject: Ready TO GO
body:
Made it to St Louis.  Thought of bcking out but too late now.   It's the 
right thing .  I am hurting too much.
Nervous for 1st procedure  in 1 at 9:00 this time ....    didn't think about 
being this scared already -  getting a Central  Line  put in .-- sounds so 
medical already.  They put you out   a  bit ut then no eatting for the big day.  
It  is uncomfortable  too - I guess nothing cmompared to  tomorrow.   ?
Please keep up.  Love to you and Sarah
 
Marcia  M.
